rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions referencing component ports in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Generated AGREE code must not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model
Ensure AGREE types match the actual AADL data types of ports and variables
Do not invent numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Component type contracts use assume/guarantee for interface behavior; implementation contracts use assign/assert for bindings
Boolean expressions in AGREE should only reference AGREE bool types or model-provided data values
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
